hero.title: Get Your Official Digital Farmer ID Card
hero.subtitle: Register to instantly generate your verified digital Farmer ID Card with QR code verification for a one-time fee of ₹50. Access exclusive benefits, direct marketplace sales, and governmental scheme updates.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you grow. Reach out to us for support or information.
contact.visit_address: Sai complex shop no-15 near BBD University Ayodhya Road Pin code-226010

about.hero_title: Rooted in the Soil of India
about.hero_subtitle: Kishan Seva was born from a simple belief — that every Indian farmer deserves dignity, a fair market, and a community that stands behind them.
about.mission_p1: We provide every registered farmer with a direct marketplace to sell organic produce and verified digital identity services — all in one unified platform.
about.mission_p2: Our platform bridges the gap between rural farmers and urban consumers, eliminating middlemen and ensuring fair prices for quality organic products.

organic.title: Organic Farming
organic.desc: Promoting sustainable, chemical-free agricultural practices rooted in ancient Indian wisdom and modern science.

protection.title: Farmer Protection
protection.desc: Verified membership cards that protect farmers from exploitation and establish their identity in the market.

community.title: Community First
community.desc: Building a powerful network where every farmer supports each other through community growth, knowledge sharing, and solidarity.

about.cta_desc: Join thousands of farmers across India who are building a better future through community, organic farming, and mutual support.

footer.mission: The premier collective for the modern Indian farmer. We facilitate a global transition to regenerative agriculture while preserving our rich rural heritage.

register.subtitle: By joining Kishan Seva, you are not just registering for a service—you are becoming part of a prestigious community of farmers.
